name: Cantaloupe Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and flour in a saucepan.
2. Add eggs, mixing well.
3. Stir in cantaloupe puree.
4. Cook over medium heat for 8 to 10 minutes, stirring constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla and butter.
6. Cool completely.
7. Pour filling into pastry shell and spread evenly with whipped cream.
8. Chill.
